name: haipipe
description: Skills for the haipipe data + NN + endpoint pipeline. Tier-1 user umbrellas (/haipipe-data, /haipipe-nn, /haipipe-end, /haipipe-project, /haipipe-subject) parse intent and dispatch to per-stage / per-target / per-risk-profile Tier-2 specialists. Covers stages 0-2 (per-subject data contract), 1-4 (project-wide data build), 5 (model training), 6 (endpoint packaging + deploy targets: SageMaker, Databricks, Flask, MLflow), and per-project scaffolding.
